title: ceratophyllaceae
intro: The Ceratophyllaceae rank is a family of flowering plants, also known as hornwort family. It consists of aquatic plants that have adapted to live in water environments, such as rivers and lakes, and are characterized by their unique, leafless stems. The family Ceratophyllaceae is relatively small, comprising only a few species of hornwort plants. These plants are known for their ability to thrive in a variety of aquatic conditions and their simple, yet effective, adaptations for survival in water.
